purpose: Track reviewed release pins and watched upstream refs for the read-only pymc-repeater-console merge-readiness workflow.

policy.workflow_behavior: resolve drift, temporarily build/test watched SHAs, and report a verdict without changing pins or publishing images
policy.authoritative_release_pins: Keep Dockerfile ARG defaults and .github/workflows/build-pymc-repeater-console.yml PYMC_*_DEFAULT_REF values aligned. This manifest mirrors the reviewed baseline for drift reporting.

upstreams.name: OpenHop Repeater
upstreams.notes: Backend daemon formerly named pyMC Repeater; fetched and installed unchanged during the wrapper build.

upstreams.name: OpenHop Core
upstreams.notes: Reviewed source pin for the renamed OpenHop Core lineage. The renamed repeater runtime imports the published openhop_core package.

upstreams.name: pyMC Console dist
upstreams.notes: Frontend distribution copied unchanged into the wrapper image.
